name: Crab Rangoon
recipeIngredient: 4 Green onion, finely chopped (tops and all)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, crab meat, and chopped green onions in a bowl; mix well.
2. Place a mound of filling in the center of a wonton wrapper; dampen the edges with water.
3. Fold the wrapper into a triangular shape, sealing the edges carefully.
4. Fry the filled wrappers in hot oil until crispy and golden brown.
